function.message: I still cannot tell whether this is for operators, managers, or founders. Pick one and make the pain concrete.
function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap with /AGENTS.MD and context; read nested AGENTS.MD files for /99_system, /10_entities, /10_entities/cast, /60_outbox, and /60_outbox/channels; performed exhaustive read of every channel log as required by task-local hint.
function.outcome_justification: The canonical entity record at 10_entities/cast/nina.md identifies Nina Schreiber with alias nina. Across all nine channel logs under 60_outbox/channels, the only message attributed to Nina Schreiber appears in 60_outbox/channels/northstar_email.md dated 2026-04-13, so it is the latest recorded message from Schreiber Nina.
